title: Shimshown #8123
definition:
Samson = "like the sun"

 1) a Danite, son of Manoah, a Nazarite for life, and a judge of
    Israel for 20 years
nasbUsage:
Definition: Samson = "like the sun"

 1) a Danite, son of Manoah, a Nazarite for life, and a judge of
    Israel for 20 years

    NASB:  a deliverer of Isr.
